name: Azure
description: Microsoft Azure is a large cloud platform that often fits enterprise environments already built around Microsoft identity, productivity, and infrastructure tooling.
whyUseIt: Useful when enterprise integration, Microsoft ecosystem alignment, and corporate IT compatibility matter strongly.

vocabulary.definition: Microsoft's identity layer for access and authentication.
Managed relational database services on Azure.

beginnerMistakes: Judging Azure without considering existing Microsoft dependence
Thinking enterprise fit automatically means lower complexity
